mapper.select: select room_id, user_id, nickname, deposit_amount, status, created_at, updated_at from auction_room_registration where room_id = #{roomId} and user_id = #{userId}
select room_id, user_id, nickname, deposit_amount, status, created_at, updated_at from auction_room_registration where room_id = #{roomId} order by created_at asc
mapper.insert: insert into auction_room_registration ( room_id, user_id, nickname, deposit_amount, status, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{roomId}, #{userId}, #{nickname}, #{depositAmount}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
